name: Proxy Execution via Desktop Setting Control Panel Detected
description: Suspicious use of rundll32.exe with desk.cpl to install/execute a screensaver (.scr) file, indicating potential defense evasion or persistence.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when the rundll32.exe process was created.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the rundll32.exe executable.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line arguments of rundll32.exe, including desk.cpl, InstallScreenSaver, and the .scr file path.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process that launched rundll32.exe.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the event occurred.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
